description: Implement LEDGER ROUTER + LEDGER WRITER + NEXT ACTOR GOVERNANCE CONTRACT system. Create governance/ledger_router.md to define routing logic, governance/ledger_writer.md to specify write operations, and governance/next_actor_contract.md to establish actor transition rules. This addresses roadmap item 11 by establishing the routing, writer path, and next actor governance framework.
routing_decision_basis: Roadmap progression from completed item 10 (UNIVERSAL EXECUTOR/AUDITOR EXCHANGE LEDGER LOOP) to item 11 (LEDGER ROUTER + LEDGER WRITER + NEXT ACTOR GOVERNANCE CONTRACT)
